greeting.npc_text: You got through. Good. Sit down.

not_ready.npc_text: I have seventeen cases open right now. Yours will be processed. Through the process. Give me a reason to expedite it.

what_helps.npc_text: I've been in back-to-back performance reviews since 7 AM. I've signed fourteen separation agreements today. My hands are cramping. My patience is negative. What helps is someone who doesn't make my day harder.

choices.text: Is there anything I can actually do?
Sorry. I'll leave you to it.

stress_hint.npc_text: I have seventeen open cases and no functioning executive function. I can't process paperwork in this state. Someone needs to do something about the ambient stress level in this room before I can help anyone.

choices.text: I'll see what I can do.

ready_talk.npc_text: Right. Your MSA. It should be in the grey filing cabinet — the one on your left. The access code is my cost centre number. I can't remember it off the top of my head, but it'll be on my computer. Except the personnel system needs a USB access dongle to open it. Security. You know how it is.

choices.text: Where would I find an authorised USB device?
Before the file — there's an Amazon package downstairs addressed to someone named Chen.

usb_hint.npc_text: The CVNA lab would have one. They use USB security tokens for their build deployments — same protocol as the HR personnel system. Don't ask me why those two things share a standard. I didn't design it. Someone down there will have one.

package_mention.npc_text: Chen? They were let go Tuesday. That package has been sitting undelivered in the system. You have it?

effects.text: Bob opens the package. A pause.
There's a pen in here. Nice one.
He slides it across to you.
Take it. You'll need it to sign the agreement.

choices.text: Not yet. I'll bring it when I have it.

agreement_sign_prompt.npc_text: You have the document. Sign it. And it needs co-signing — executive credentials on the second page. You know what that means.

co_sign_prompt.npc_text: The co-signed version. Hand it over and we're done.
